channel.title: netbsd on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in netbsd on IT notes

item.title: pkgin
item.description: To install pkgin in NetBSD: # export PKG_PATH="http://ftp.netbsd.org/pub/pkgsrc/packages/NetBSD/amd64/7.0.1/All/" then: # pkg_add -v pkgin-* Finish by updating: # pkgin update
